error_handling.overview: Error scenarios and recovery patterns for the Debugger mode.

category.name: validation_errors
category.description: Errors during MCP validation or test creation

pattern.name: MCP tool not available
pattern.symptom: MCP tool returns "Game instance not available" or similar

resolution.step: Verify game instance is initialized
Check that MCP toolkit has access to game object
Ensure game is not in a crashed or invalid state

pattern.name: Test assertion fails unexpectedly
pattern.symptom: Test fails but bug is not reproducible via MCP

resolution.step: Re-validate bug using MCP with same test setup
Check for non-deterministic behavior
Verify test setup matches MCP validation exactly

pattern.name: Multiple possible root causes
pattern.symptom: Code inspection reveals multiple potential issues

resolution.step: Prioritize by impact and likelihood
Test each hypothesis with MCP validation
Fix the most specific cause first

pattern.name: Root cause in different file
pattern.symptom: Bug manifests in one file but root cause is elsewhere

resolution.step: Trace the data flow from source to symptom
Identify the actual origin of the issue
Fix at the source, not the symptom
Determine if failure is related to the fix
If related, the fix is incomplete or incorrect
If unrelated, it's a pre-existing issue to document
Re-validate bug with MCP to confirm it still exists
Re-analyze root cause
Consider if fix was applied correctly

pattern.name: Cannot reproduce bug via MCP
pattern.symptom: MCP validation shows expected behavior, but bug is reported

resolution.step: Ask for specific reproduction steps
Check if bug is environment-specific
Verify MCP setup matches user's environment
Read error message carefully
Check tool parameters
Verify game state allows the operation

steps.step: Revert the fix using version control
Document the issue and attempted fixes
Explain why current approach won't work
Request Architect mode for design guidance

strategy.name: add_regression_test
strategy.description: When bug was not caught by existing tests

steps.step: Create test that would have caught the bug
Verify test fails with current code

debugging_checklist.item: Test created that reproduces the bug
Test fails with current code (confirms bug exists)
